name: Storage of Sensitive Data in a Mechanism without Access Control
description: The product stores sensitive information in a file system or device that lacks built-in access controls, such as memory cards, USB devices, or Android external storage. Any entity on the system can read or write this data, creating exposure risks in multi-user environments.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM or EGRESS node writes sensitive data from STORAGE[sensitive] to STORAGE[external_storage] (SD card, USB, shared filesystem) without an AUTH[access_control] node enforcing read/write permissions on the destination storage
